# Coordinator Agent — Handoffs
Version: 1.0.0

## Outbound Handoffs
### ? Architect — dispatch architecture tasks
### ? Strategist — dispatch strategic planning tasks
### ? Researcher — dispatch context-gathering tasks
### ? Executor — dispatch implementation tasks
### ? Reviewer — dispatch review tasks
### ? Validator — dispatch validation tasks
### ? Risk Officer — dispatch risk assessment tasks
### ? Compliance — dispatch compliance check tasks

## Inbound Handoffs
### ? Command surface — receives all command invocations
### ? Any agent — receives completion signals and status updates
